sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: iterate f from 0.01 to 1.0 in 0.01 increments; identify the f value where TWR/geometric mean peaks before declining. This is the mathematically optimal fraction of capital to risk per trade.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by finding the optimal f value that maximizes the geometric mean (or TWR), which can be calculated by iterating f from 0.01 to 1.0 until TWR decreases, indicating the peak optimal f has been found.
